ddls:
CREATE TABLE "build_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the build configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the build configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the build configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the build configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the build configuration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the build configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the build configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build option */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the build option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the build option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the build option */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the option belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the build option (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the build option is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_options_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compiler_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compiler option */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the compiler option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compiler option */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the compiler option */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the option belongs to */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the compiler option is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compiler_options_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_history" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration used */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date the build was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the build */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the build */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the build in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "vc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the version control entry belongs to */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the version control repository */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the version control repository */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version control repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CI/CD pipeline */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the pipeline belongs to */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the CI/CD pipeline */,
  "pipeline_status" TEXT /* Status of the CI/CD pipeline (e.g., running, failed) */,
  "last_run_date" TEXT /* Date the pipeline was last run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_pipelines_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object affected (e.g., build configuration, user) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build dependency */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the dependency belongs to */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the build dependency */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the build dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_dependencies_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build artifact */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build configuration the artifact belongs to */,
  "artifact_name" TEXT /* Name of the build artifact */,
  "artifact_path" TEXT /* Path of the build artifact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_artifacts_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES build_configurations ("config_id")
)
